title: 50m Premium Heavy Duty 20 Micron Thick Kitchen Foil Catering Aluminium Tin Foil Roll - 30cm Wide
features: THICK 20-MICRON ALUMINIUM FOIL: Durable, versatile, non-stick foil paper. Perfect tin foil for all cooking needs! Works well to keep food fresh and secure during cooking and storage.
KITCHEN FOIL WITH INTEGRATED CUTTER FOR EASY USE! Perfect for long aluminum foil, heavy-duty foil aluminum roll, and aluminum foil sheets. Ideal for all cooking, grilling, and storage needs.

LONG LASTING ALUMINUM FOIL: 164ft (50m) length, 11.8" (30cm) width. Durable heavy duty tin foil roll and aluminum foils for baking, grilling, and covering pans. Ideal for versatile kitchen use and daily cooking needs
FOOD GRADE KITCHEN FOIL: Safe for wraps, plastic wrap, and food. Ideal for cooking, storage, whole foods, and kitchen accessories. Perfect for egg wraps and tin foil roll needs.
VERSATILE FOIL: Great for roasting, grilling, storing, and lining trays. Durable tin foil roll, extra wide tin foil sheets, and food wrap. Perfect for cooking paper and everyday use
description: Product Description Key Features Perfect Width for All Uses: 11.8” / 300mm Aluminum Foil LuxLiv aluminum foil offers an ideal width of 11.8” / 300mm, making it versatile for every kitchen need. From small tasks to larger dishes, this foil is designed to deliver convenience and precision in food preparation and storage. Extra-Long Durability: 164ft / 50m Aluminum Foil Say goodbye to running out of foil! LuxLiv's aluminum foil provides a generous length of 164ft / 50m, ensuring you have enough for all your cooking, grilling, and baking needs. Built for longevity and convenience in every roll. Heavy-Duty Performance: 20-Micron Thickness LuxLiv premium aluminum foil boasts an impressive 20-micron thickness, delivering unmatched strength and durability. Resistant to tears and punctures, it's the perfect solution for grilling, baking, and protecting your food. Effortless Precision: Integrated Foil Cutter LuxLiv kitchen foil packaging has an integrated foil cutter for ease of use and safety! LuxLiv foil has plastic ends that fit into the core of the roll in order for the aluminum to slide out as easy as possible. This allows you to have a seemingly easy time to keep around the kitchen and use without wasting any foil. The cutting edge makes for an easy rip without wasting any foil. No need to double the wrapping anymore since the quality is thick enough. Key Features! Certified Safe for All Food Uses LuxLiv kitchen foil is food grade safe. It can be used at any time and NO harmful substances. You can use aluminum foil with confidence! Exceptional foil for all types of meal preparation. Many uses for BBQ, toasting, steaming, grilling, broiling etc. The thickness will make sure food stays safe while protecting from spills and splatter. This aluminum foil can be used to preserve food for after meals and for meal preps. Great item for all of its many uses. High Heat Resistance for Versatile Cooking LuxLiv aluminum foil can handle high heat with ease, making it ideal for grilling, baking, and oven use. Whether you're preparing a roast or protecting dishes from over-browning, this foil is built to withstand extreme temperatures Multi-Purpose Functionality for Every Need This foil does it all - You can use aluminum foil to line the closet and drawer space. You can easily cover areas such as a doorknob if you need to paint or touch up spots on the walls. Great product to help clean grills and pots and pans. This foil is thick enough to catch oils and grease and easy to dispose of. The list of uses for this product goes on and on. 40m Extra Wide Premium Kitchen Foil - Extra Thick LuxLiv Pre Cut Thick Pop Up Foil Sheets LuxLiv Baking Paper - 50m Roll LuxLiv Sandwhich Bags LuxLiv Food Bags Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 427 4.7 out of 5 stars 201 4.6 out of 5 stars 330 4.3 out of 5 stars 153 4.2 out of 5 stars 95 Price £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 — no data — no data — no data Size 40m x 450mm Wde 200 Sheets - 12" x 10" each 50m x 300mm wide Half Gallon - 228 x 220 x 63mm 7 x 8" - 178 x 203mm Units 1 Roll 200 Sheets 1 Roll 100 Sandwhich Bags 40 Food Bags Material Aluminium Foil Aluminium Foil Unbleached Parchment Paper Food Grade Plastic Food Grade Plastic
